info.title: An extremely fast Python package manager.
info.description: An unofficial redistribution of https://github.com/astral-sh/uv for consumption through Nuget

options.name: --requirements
options.description: Add the packages listed in the given files

options.name: --constraints
options.description: Constrain versions using the given requirements files [env: UV_CONSTRAINT=]

options.name: --marker
options.description: Apply this marker to all added packages

options.name: --dev
options.description: Add the requirements to the development dependency group [env: UV_DEV=]

options.name: --optional
options.description: Add the requirements to the package's optional dependencies for the specified extra

options.name: --group
options.description: Add the requirements to the specified dependency group

options.name: --editable
options.description: Add the requirements as editable

options.name: --raw
options.description: Add a dependency as provided

options.name: --bounds
options.description:
The kind of version specifier to use when adding dependencies [possible values: lower,
major, minor, exact]

options.name: --rev
options.description: Commit to use when adding a dependency from Git

options.name: --tag
options.description: Tag to use when adding a dependency from Git

options.name: --branch
options.description: Branch to use when adding a dependency from Git

options.name: --lfs
options.description: Whether to use Git LFS when adding a dependency from Git

options.name: --extra
options.description: Extras to enable for the dependency

options.name: --no-sync
options.description: Avoid syncing the virtual environment [env: UV_NO_SYNC=]

options.name: --locked
options.description: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged [env: UV_LOCKED=]

options.name: --frozen
options.description: Add dependencies without re-locking the project [env: UV_FROZEN=]

options.name: --active
options.description: Prefer the active virtual environment over the project's virtual environment

options.name: --package
options.description: Add the dependency to a specific package in the workspace

options.name: --script
options.description: Add the dependency to the specified Python script, rather than to a project

options.name: --workspace
options.description: Add the dependency as a workspace member

options.name: --no-workspace
options.description: Don't add the dependency as a workspace member

options.name: --no-install-project
options.description: Do not install the current project

options.name: --no-install-workspace
options.description: Do not install any workspace members, including the current project

options.name: --no-install-local
options.description: Do not install local path dependencies

options.name: --no-install-package
options.description: Do not install the given package(s)

options.name: --index
options.description:
The URLs to use when resolving dependencies, in addition to the default index [env:
UV_INDEX=]

options.name: --default-index
options.description:
The URL of the default package index (by default: <https://pypi.org/simple>) [env:
UV_DEFAULT_INDEX=]

options.name: --index-url
options.description:
(Deprecated: use `--default-index` instead) The URL of the Python package index (by
default: <https://pypi.org/simple>) [env: UV_INDEX_URL=]

options.name: --extra-index-url
options.description:
(Deprecated: use `--index` instead) Extra URLs of package indexes to use, in addition to
`--index-url` [env: UV_EXTRA_INDEX_URL=]

options.name: --find-links
options.description:
Locations to search for candidate distributions, in addition to those found in the
registry indexes [env: UV_FIND_LINKS=]

options.name: --no-index
options.description:
Ignore the registry index (e.g., PyPI), instead relying on direct URL dependencies and
those provided via `--find-links`

options.name: --index-strategy
options.description:
The strategy to use when resolving against multiple index URLs [env: UV_INDEX_STRATEGY=]
[possible values: first-index, unsafe-first-match, unsafe-best-match]

options.name: --keyring-provider
options.description:
Attempt to use `keyring` for authentication for index URLs [env: UV_KEYRING_PROVIDER=]
[possible values: disabled, subprocess]

options.name: --upgrade
options.description:
Allow package upgrades, ignoring pinned versions in any existing output file. Implies
`--refresh`

options.name: --upgrade-package
options.description:
Allow upgrades for a specific package, ignoring pinned versions in any existing output
file. Implies `--refresh-package`

options.name: --resolution
--prerelease
options.description:
The strategy to use when considering pre-release versions [env: UV_PRERELEASE=] [possible
values: disallow, allow, if-necessary, explicit, if-necessary-or-explicit]

options.name: --fork-strategy
options.description:
The strategy to use when selecting multiple versions of a given package across Python
versions and platforms [env: UV_FORK_STRATEGY=] [possible values: fewest, requires-python]

options.name: --exclude-newer
options.description:
Limit candidate packages to those that were uploaded prior to the given date [env:
UV_EXCLUDE_NEWER=]

options.name: --exclude-newer-package
options.description:
Limit candidate packages for specific packages to those that were uploaded prior to the
given date

options.name: --no-sources
options.description:
Ignore the `tool.uv.sources` table when resolving dependencies. Used to lock against the
standards-compliant, publishable package metadata, as opposed to using any workspace, Git,
URL, or local path sources [env: UV_NO_SOURCES=]

options.name: --reinstall
options.description: Reinstall all packages, regardless of whether they're already installed. Implies

options.name: --reinstall-package
options.description:
Reinstall a specific package, regardless of whether it's already installed. Implies
`--refresh-package`

options.name: --link-mode
options.description:
The method to use when installing packages from the global cache [env: UV_LINK_MODE=]
[possible values: clone, copy, hardlink, symlink]

options.name: --compile-bytecode
options.description: Compile Python files to bytecode after installation [env: UV_COMPILE_BYTECODE=]

options.name: --config-setting
options.description: Settings to pass to the PEP 517 build backend, specified as `KEY=VALUE` pairs

options.name: --config-settings-package
options.description:
Settings to pass to the PEP 517 build backend for a specific package, specified as
`PACKAGE:KEY=VALUE` pairs

options.name: --no-build-isolation
options.description: Disable isolation when building source distributions [env: UV_NO_BUILD_ISOLATION=]

options.name: --no-build-isolation-package
options.description: Disable isolation when building source distributions for a specific package

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build source distributions [env: UV_NO_BUILD=]

options.name: --no-build-package
options.description: Don't build source distributions for a specific package [env: UV_NO_BUILD_PACKAGE=]

options.name: --no-binary
options.description: Don't install pre-built wheels [env: UV_NO_BINARY=]

options.name: --no-binary-package
options.description: Don't install pre-built wheels for a specific package [env: UV_NO_BINARY_PACKAGE=]

options.name: --no-cache
options.description:
Avoid reading from or writing to the cache, instead using a temporary directory for the
duration of the operation [env: UV_NO_CACHE=]

options.name: --cache-dir
options.description: Path to the cache directory [env: UV_CACHE_DIR=]

options.name: --refresh
options.description: Refresh all cached data

options.name: --refresh-package
options.description: Refresh cached data for a specific package

options.name: --python
options.description:
The Python interpreter to use for resolving and syncing. [env:
UV_PYTHON=]

options.name: --managed-python
options.description: Require use of uv-managed Python versions [env: UV_MANAGED_PYTHON=]

options.name: --no-managed-python
options.description: Disable use of uv-managed Python versions [env: UV_NO_MANAGED_PYTHON=]

options.name: --no-python-downloads
options.description:
Disable automatic downloads of Python. [env:
"UV_PYTHON_DOWNLOADS=never"]

options.name: --quiet...
options.description: Use quiet output

options.name: --verbose...
options.description: Use verbose output

options.name: --color
options.description: Control the use of color in output [possible values: auto, always, never]

options.name: --native-tls
options.description:
Whether to load TLS certificates from the platform's native certificate store [env:
UV_NATIVE_TLS=]

options.name: --offline
options.description: Disable network access [env: UV_OFFLINE=]

options.name: --allow-insecure-host
options.description: Allow insecure connections to a host [env: UV_INSECURE_HOST=]

options.name: --no-progress
options.description: Hide all progress outputs [env: UV_NO_PROGRESS=]

options.name: --directory
options.description: Change to the given directory prior to running the command [env: UV_WORKING_DIR=]

options.name: --project
options.description: Discover a project in the given directory [env: UV_PROJECT=]

options.name: --config-file
options.description: The path to a `uv.toml` file to use for configuration [env: UV_CONFIG_FILE=]

options.name: --no-config
options.description: Avoid discovering configuration files (`pyproject.toml`, `uv.toml`) [env: UV_NO_CONFIG=]
